Metadata.Description: Add scoped running-time observability and terminal result queries for detached bash and detached delegate actor tasks.

TaskGroup.name: Observability Model And Query Contracts
TaskGroup.Description: Define bounded detached log/message/result data model and query tool contracts.

Task.name: Add observability model tests
Task.Description: Write failing tests for per-task ring buffer sequencing, source filtering, byte/entry limits, and dropped metadata.

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: Tests cover stdout/stderr filtering and monotonic sequence cursors.
Tests cover rolling discard metadata when retention limits are exceeded.

Task.name: Implement detached observability store
Task.Description: Add in-runtime structures and helpers for detached log chunks, message entries, result snapshots, and bounded retention.

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: Detached observability helpers append and query by task id.
Overflow behavior preserves newest entries and reports dropped metadata.

Task.name: Add query tool contract tests
Task.Description: Write failing tests for DetachedActorLogs, DetachedActorMessages, and DetachedActorResult tool schemas and empty/not-found behavior.

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: Query tools validate missing and unknown task ids.
Query tools support source, role, kind, range, and limit parameters.

Task.name: Implement query tools
Task.Description: Add tools for detached logs, detached messages, and detached terminal results while preserving DetachedActorStatus compatibility.

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: DetachedActorLogs returns scoped log chunks and cursor metadata.
DetachedActorMessages returns scoped message entries and cursor metadata.
DetachedActorResult returns terminal state and not-terminal responses.

TaskGroup.name: Streaming Detached Bash
TaskGroup.Description: Make RunDetachedBash observable while running through streaming stdout/stderr capture.

Task.name: Add streaming bash tests
Task.Description: Write failing tests showing RunDetachedBash stdout/stderr can be queried while the command is still running and after it exits.

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: Running RunDetachedBash exposes stdout tail before completion.
Running RunDetachedBash exposes stderr tail separately before completion.
Completed RunDetachedBash result includes terminal status and bounded stdout/stderr tail.

Task.name: Implement streaming sandboxed bash backend
Task.Description: Add a streaming process backend that shares permission and sandbox selection semantics with existing bash execution.

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: Streaming backend appends stdout and stderr chunks with source metadata.
Timeout, process error, exit code, and signal are reflected in task result.

Task.name: Wire RunDetachedBash to streaming execution
Task.Description: Route RunDetachedBash through the streaming backend while keeping task id creation and background scheduling behavior stable.

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: RunDetachedBash still returns a parseable task id immediately.
RunDetachedBash logs are queryable by source while running.
Existing detached bash tests continue to pass or are updated to the new observability contract.

TaskGroup.name: Detached Delegate Messages And Results
TaskGroup.Description: Expose recent messages and terminal results for RunDelegateActor detached tasks.

Task.name: Add delegate message observability tests
Task.Description: Write failing tests for querying assistant messages, tool call starts, tool results, errors, range cursors, and retention metadata from detached delegate actors.

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: Tests cover role-filtered assistant message queries.
Tests cover kind-filtered tool event queries.
Tests verify system prompts and hidden reasoning are not exposed.

Task.name: Capture delegate actor entries
Task.Description: Add executor/orchestrator taps that append message and tool event entries to the detached observability store for child fibers.

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: Assistant output, tool call start, tool result, failure, cancellation, and completion entries are captured.
Entries are associated with the correct task id and child actor/fiber identifiers.

Task.name: Implement delegate result queries
Task.Description: Return terminal status, final assistant result, and optional bounded message tail for completed detached delegate actors.

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: Completed delegate result includes final assistant text.
Non-terminal delegate result reports current status unless partial results are requested.

TaskGroup.name: Compatibility And Verification
TaskGroup.Description: Preserve existing detached status, background result events, and recovery semantics while validating the new observability path.

Task.name: Add compatibility regression tests
Task.Description: Verify DetachedActorStatus, DetachedActorList, semantic background result events, and existing detached task completion behavior remain compatible.

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: Existing status/list JSON shape remains compatible.
Background result events still emit terminal results.

Task.name: Run focused test suites
Task.Description: Run the smallest relevant Bun test targets for detached bash, detached status, orchestration, sandbox backend, and terminal projection behavior.

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: Focused detached actor and sandbox tests pass.
No regression is introduced in terminal background result projection tests.

Task.name: Document implementation notes
Task.Description: Update track analysis notes with final defaults, caveats, and any deferred durability work.

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: Track analysis documents default retention limits and known tradeoffs.
